data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
Select Tab.membership_no , '3000000125003' as coop_registered_no , Tab.account_year , Tab.id_card , Tab.prename , Tab.member_name , Tab.member_surname --, Tab.national_name , DECODE(Tab.national_name , '' , 'ไทย' , Tab.national_name ) as national_name --, ( NVL(Tab.data_balance,0) * Tab.share_value_perunit ) / 100 as share_value , CASE WHEN Tab.member_status_code = '3' THEN ( NVL(Tab.share_stock_holding_detail,0) * Tab.share_value_perunit ) / 100 ELSE ( NVL(Tab.data_balance,0) * Tab.share_value_perunit ) / 100 END as share_value
, Tab.share_value_perunit , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(Tab.approve_date,'ddmmyyyy') as approve_date --, Tab.mem_type_desc , DECODE(Tab.mem_type , '01' , '1' , '02' , '2' ) as mem_type_desc , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(Tab.resignation_approve_date,'ddmmyyyy') as resignation_approve_date , Tab.address_pres_address_no , Tab.address_pres_tambol , Tab.address_pres_district , Tab.address_pres_province , Tab.address_pres_post , Tab.address_pres_telephone
From ( select sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code , sc_cls_confirm_mem.mem_type , ( select mem_type_desc from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type where mem_type_code = sc_cls_confirm_mem.mem_type ) as mem_type_desc , ( select id_card from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no ) as id_card , EXTRACT( YEAR from confirm_date )+543 as account_year
, ( select sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code and membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no ) as prename
, ( select member_name from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no ) as member_name , ( select member_surname from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no ) as member_surname
, ( select sc_mem_m_ucf_nationality.nationality_description from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_nationality where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.nationality_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_nationality.nationality_code and membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no ) as national_name
, ( select approve_date from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no ) as approve_date , ( select resignation_approve_date from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no ) as resignation_approve_date , ( select share_value_perunit from sc_share_m_constant ) as share_value_perunit
, ( select data_balance from sc_cls_confirm_data where data_group = 'SHR' and membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and confirm_date = sc_cls_confirm_mem.confirm_date ) as data_balance
, ( select share_stock from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail where 1=1 and membership_no = sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no and seq_no = ( select max(seq_no) - 1 from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail temp where 1=1 --and item_type in ('WD','TL') and seq_no < ( select max(seq_no) from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail temp where item_type in ('WD','TL') and temp.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no ) and temp.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail.membership_no ) ) as share_stock_holding_detail
-- ที่อยู่ตามทะเบียนบ้าน , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '6' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '6' ) ) AS address_pres_address_no , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '8' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '8' ) ) AS address_pres_moo , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '7' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '7' ) ) AS address_pres_mooban , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '9' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '9' ) ) AS address_pres_road , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '10' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '10' ) ) AS address_pres_soi , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '11' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '11' ) ) AS address_pres_tambol , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '12' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '12' ) ) AS address_pres_district , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '13' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '13' ) ) AS address_pres_province , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '14' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '14' ) ) AS address_pres_post , DECODE ( PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '15' ) , '-' , '' , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_letter ( sc_cls_confirm_mem.membership_no , '1' , '15' ) ) AS address_pres_telephone
from sc_cls_confirm_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group
where 1=1 and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_cls_confirm_mem.member_status_code = '0'
/*WHERE*/
) Tab
WHERE 1=2
